## Checklist

- [ ] If a workflow changed, I exported clean JSON and ran PK-07 (no secrets)
- [ ] Sample data is fake (`@example.com`, invented IDs)
- [ ] I updated the relevant doc in `docs/`
- [ ] I added a line to `docs/CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Still runs on n8n Cloud with no external database
